# Cigarette

## Tags
smoking

## Categories
travel, transportation, medical

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/cigarette)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Cigarette;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Cigarette { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
